case_title: SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY VS. KOZERA MCFADDEN et al

docket_entries.description: ORDER FOR POSTING AND MAILING OF SUMMONS / ORDER PERMITTING SERVICE BY POSTING AND MAILING PURSUANT TO CCP SECTION 415.45 (COPY IN D.206)

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY AS TO DEFENDANT MCFADDEN, KOZERA DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER FOR POSTING AND MAILING OF SUMMONS, DECLARATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MCFADDEN, KOZERA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1638 25TH STREET, SAN FRANCISCO CA 94107, LEASE FORFEITED, **TO INCLUDE ALL UNNAMED OCCUPANTS/TENANTS**
